summary: First-finish smoke testing of CLIPSTORM clip voting platform. All 8 backend endpoints behave per spec; all primary frontend flows (3D hero, login, submit, vote, leaderboard nav) work end-to-end on the public preview URL.
passed: POST /api/auth/mock-login is idempotent per username (same id returned on repeat)
GET /api/auth/me returns user with X-User-Id and null without header
POST /api/clips: 401 without auth, 400 on invalid URL, 200 with parsed kick_clip_id, 409 on duplicate
GET /api/clips supports sort=top and sort=new, includes has_voted field
POST /api/clips/{id}/vote increments votes, 409 on double-vote, 401 without auth
DELETE /api/clips/{id}/vote decrements votes and clears has_voted
GET /api/clips/{id} returns single clip with has_voted
Frontend: hero-section + 3D <canvas> render, feed-section + sort-top/new buttons present
Frontend: login dialog -> user-chip displayed with username after submit
Frontend: submit-clip dialog accepts valid Kick URL, new clip appears in feed (count went 3->4)
Frontend: upvote click increments vote-count from 0 to 1 in UI
Frontend: nav-leaderboard navigates to /leaderboard and renders leaderboard-winner-card

failed.issue: On invalid Kick URL submission, no element matching .error/[class*=error]/[role=alert] was found. Error is likely shown via toast (sonner) which may or may not be reaching the user; not verifiable via standard error selectors.
failed.evidence: Invalid URL error indicator: NONE in playwright run; valid submission immediately after worked.

action_items: Optional: add a data-testid or role=alert on the SubmitClipDialog inline error/toast so error UX is verifiable and accessible.
Minor: three.js console warning 'THREE.Clock deprecated, use THREE.Timer' - cosmetic, can be addressed later.

notes.auth_mode: MOCKED username login (Phase 2 will replace with Telegram). Documented in UI footer 'Telegram verification - Phase 2'.
notes.test_credentials_file: Present but empty - not needed for mock auth.
notes.clip_detail_page: Not explicitly navigated to in this iteration but route exists; backend GET /api/clips/{id} verified.
